basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani PhD Scholar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani (BITS Pilani)
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani (BITS Pilani) PhD Scholar Notification 2026 has been released on 16 July 2026 on the official website bits-pilani.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the BITS Pilani PhD Scholar Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech./ M.E. in Mechanical Engineering/ Materials Engineering/ Chemical Engineering/Polymer Engineering/Energy Engineering or other allied disciplines from a recognized university with minimum 60% aggregate marks or equivalent CGPA
qualification.details: M.Tech./ M.E. in Mechanical Engineering/ Materials Engineering/ Chemical Engineering/Polymer Engineering/Energy Engineering or other allied disciplines from a recognized university, with minimum 60% aggregate marks or equivalent CGPA. GATE qualified candidates will be given preference.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BITS Pilani PhD Scholar Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BITS Pilani PhD Scholar Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the BITS Pilani Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download BITS Pilani PhD Scholar Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.Tech./ M.E. in Mechanical Engineering/ Materials Engineering/ Chemical Engineering/Polymer Engineering/Energy Engineering or other allied disciplines from a recognized university, with minimum 60% aggregate marks or equivalent CGPA. GATE qualified candidates will be given preference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for BITS Pilani PhD Scholar Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BITS Pilani PhD Scholar Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BITS Pilani PhD Scholar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to send the application via email for the BITS Pilani PhD Scholar position is 25 July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for PhD Scholar posts at BITS Pilani?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy announced for the PhD Scholar post in the BITS Pilani recruitment drive. Interested candidates should check the eligibility criteria carefully.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for BITS Pilani PhD Scholar posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the BITS Pilani PhD Scholar recruitment is Email. Candidates need to prepare their application and send it to the specified official email address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the PhD Scholar position at BITS Pilani?
faq.answer: The salary for the PhD Scholar position at BITS Pilani is ₹ 48,100 per month. This stipend is offered to selected candidates as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the PhD Scholar post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an M.Tech./ M.E. in Mechanical Engineering or allied disciplines from a recognized university with a minimum of 60% aggregate marks or equivalent CGPA. GATE qualified candidates are preferred.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the BITS Pilani PhD Scholar recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the BITS Pilani PhD Scholar recruitment. Candidates can apply free of cost.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for BITS Pilani PhD Scholar posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the BITS Pilani PhD Scholar position involves an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their applications and called for an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the job location for the BITS Pilani PhD Scholar position?
faq.answer: The job location for the PhD Scholar position is Hyderabad, Telangana. Candidates should be prepared to relocate to Hyderabad if selected for the post.

faq.question: Q9. When was the official notification for BITS Pilani PhD Scholar released?
faq.answer: The official notification for the BITS Pilani PhD Scholar recruitment was released on 16 July 2026. All important dates and details are mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to apply for the PhD Scholar post via email?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs along with their bio-data in the application email.
